name: dropi-header
description: Top header bar. 70px height. Shows community badge, language selector, wallet balance, notifications bell with badge, and user avatar with name.
designRules: Left side: community membership text (if applicable)
Right side: language, wallet balance, notification bell, user profile
Notification bell shows Badge-counters component for unread count
User avatar is 35px circle with initial letter on gray-200 background
All text is Inter Regular 14px, gray-500 color
